description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding wooden cabinet with a rectangular shape and a modern, minimalist design. The front features a large, dark-tinted glass or acrylic panel set within a wooden frame, likely serving as a door to an interior compartment. The lower section of the front has horizontal wooden slats, possibly indicating a drawer or decorative panel. The sides and back are made of smooth, continuous wood panels with a natural grain pattern, and the back has a small rectangular cutout, possibly for cable management or ventilation. The top surface is flat and can be used to support additional objects. The overall finish is matte with a warm brown wood tone, and there are no visible handles or knobs.
description: A modern, freestanding wooden cabinet with a large dark front panel and horizontal slats, featuring smooth wood grain sides and a flat top.
description_view_0: The front view shows a large dark panel framed in wood, with horizontal slats at the bottom, suggesting a door and possible drawer.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain, uninterrupted wood grain panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a solid wood panel with a small rectangular cutout near the lower center, likely for cables or ventilation.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain wood panel with no visible features.
